accessClassRules.description: Publicly accessible data with no registration or approval gates.
Publicly listed data requiring registration or account creation before download.
Organization-internal data requiring institutional approval and credentialed access.
Controlled-access data requiring data access committee approval (e.g., dbGaP, EGA).
Secret-backed data requiring runtime credential injection and explicit host approval.

governanceMismatchRules.description: Open-governance discovery packages must not silently carry controlled or secret-backed discovery sources.
